ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Continued To Jun-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Continued To Jun-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mercy Hall appeared via zoom for Dolores Lucas (petitioner).

Ms. Hall stated that she filed the revised inventory and appraisal, that Ms. Yawitz fees of $10,000.00 are to be paid out of the reserve account, and that she will be filing a supplement prior to the next hearing. The matter is continued to June 9, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Continued To Apr-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mercy Hall for Dolores Lucas, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court inquired about the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. Ms. Hall stated that a revised inventory and appraisal is being prepared and should be completed within 2 weeks. Ms. Hall also stated that the petition would be supplemented rather than amended due to a change in the valuation of personal property. She explained that the initial inventory included estimated values, but after the sale of the real property and disposal of personal property, there were no significant remaining assets. The supplemental filing will reconcile the final inventory with the estate's actual assets.

The court noted that the probate referee had filed a request for special notice and directed that any additional filings be served on the referee. Ms. Hall confirmed that the supplement would include a request for payment of the probate referee's fees from the balance of the estate.

The court continued the matter to April 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Continued To Dec-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mercy Hall appeared via zoom for Dolores Lucas (petitioner).

Ms. Hall stated that she will be filing her papers this morning. The Court issues an oral order to clear the examiners noted by November 25, 2024, if not in compliance the Court shall impose sanctions. Matter is continued to December 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Continued To Apr-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Mercy Hall, Esq., for Dolores Lucas, Administrator.

At the outset, counsel is queried as to why a petition has not been filed since the last calling, despite her representation at the last calling that a petition would be filed within thirty (30) days. Counsel reports that the delay is due to her client's age and that all communication with her client is via U.S. mail.

The court continues the subject matter to Apr-17-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is is instructed to file a petition by Apr-03-2024 and is advised that this will be the final continuance that the court intends to grant.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Receipt For Deposit In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To Mar-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Jubilee Menzies, Esq., specially appearing for Mercy Hall, Esq., for Dolores Lucas, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel points to the ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF ORDER AND FUNDS FOR DEPOSIT IN BLOCKED ACCOUNT filed on Dec-08-2023 and confirms that all assets are FDIC insured. Counsel reports that the pending petition is with the Administrator for signature and will be filed forthwith.

The Status on Receipt for Deposit in Blocked Account is taken off calendar. The remaining subject matter is continued to Mar-06-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition by Feb-28-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mercy Hall appearing via zoom for Dolores Lucas (petitioner).

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mercy Hall appeared by zoom for Dolores Lucas (administrator).

Mrs. Hall stated that the only asset is a piece of real property, that they just got everybody to move out of the property and that they are working on listing the property for sale. Mrs. Hall also stated that there are debts that need to be paid and that she will return to court for approval of the sale once they get a buyer. Status on close of estate is continued to June 6, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed counsel that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed one week prior.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.
